title: Cobblemon Linkie
description: What if you could link your Pokemon in the chat?
body:
# Cobblemon Linkie

v1.7.3-1.1

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-linkie)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-linkie)

[GitHub](https://github.com/timinc-cobble/cobblemon-linkie)

## What if…

…you could link your Pokemon in the chat?

## Features

- Send a chat message with `[team#]` in it, where `#` is the slot of a Pokémon in your party, to see it in chat!
- Highly configurable!

## Dependencies

- [Cobblemon](https://www.notion.so/Cobblemon-22157e0d4afd80a49896c70a775a3c7f?pvs=21)
- [Cobblemon Tim Core](https://www.notion.so/Tim-Core-22057e0d4afd809b9c02e78f26805376?pvs=21)

## Testing

Give yourself any Pokémon in your first slot. Need one? Run `/pokegive timburr` for a quick one. Then send a chat message saying `Hey, check out my [team1].` and watch the message replace `[team1]` with `[Timburr]` with a hover that show a bunch of its info.

## Player Help

[Config Options](https://www.notion.so/Config-Options-32457e0d4afd8193b995e77780d118f3?pvs=21)

## Known Issues

- None. Yet. Why? Who’s asking? 👀

## Roadmap

If you’d like to keep up with the work being done on the mod, please join [the Discord](https://discord.com/invite/WKAR27SdSv) and subscribe to notifications on the channel for this content. You can also keep track of the to do list available on [the mod’s main page](https://www.notion.so/Cobblemon-Linkie-32257e0d4afd80e4b8d4f63f6cd58c07?pvs=21).

## Feedback

If you have any questions or requests concerning the mod, or just want to drop by and say hi, visit us over at [the Discord](https://discord.com/invite/WKAR27SdSv)!

## Support

If I've made something you enjoyed or helped you make something, please consider [dropping a tip in the cup](https://ko-fi.com/timsminecraftmods) and mention how I helped if you'd like!
